name: Dynavap - Cap Armor
summary: The DynaVap Cap Armor is a modular stainless steel upgrade designed to enhance the thermal performance of your existing Captive Cap.
description: The DynaVap Cap Armor is a modular stainless steel upgrade designed to enhance the thermal performance of your existing Captive Cap. By increasing overall mass and heat retention, it delivers smoother heating cycles and more controlled extractions without requiring a full cap replacement. Cap Armor installs easily by snapping over a compatible Captive Cap, extending heat duration and improving temperature stability during use. This allows for more even vapour production and reduced torch technique, making it an ideal add-on for users seeking improved performance while keeping their preferred setup. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
